title: penstemon deaveri
intro: Penstemon deaveri, also known as Deaver's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The plant's health benefits include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for soothing sore throats and alleviating cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of Penstemon deaveri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
